description: Chart for an organization, country, institution, or non-human entity. entityName is required. Uses founding or incorporation datetime. No subject DID.

record.description: Astrological chart for an organization, country, institution, or other non-human entity. Typically cast for the moment of founding, incorporation, or formal establishment.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Breaking changes bump to 2.0.0 in a new lexicon file.

entityName.description: Name of the entity, e.g. 'United States of America', 'Apple Inc.', 'Bluesky PBC'. Required.

foundingDatetime.description: Founding, incorporation, or establishment datetime (ISO 8601). Optional — some entities have uncertain founding moments.

timeConfidence.description: Reliability of the founding time. 'exact' = documented record, 'approximate' = known date but uncertain time, 'unknown' = date uncertain.

description.description: Optional notes on the entity and source of founding data.

sourceUrl.description: URL referencing the source of founding data (e.g., incorporation record, official history).

western.description: Western tropical astrological data. See space.chartid.defs#westernData.

extensions.description: Top-level extension point for fields not yet in spec.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this record was created (ISO 8601).
